rows.description: Computus Francisci Webber Rectoris a 2do Die Novembris 1767 ad eundem Diem revolutum 1768.
rows.notes: Merged 'gemini-flash' rows 1 and 2 for a single logical header, using its more accurate transcription of 'Novembris' and 'Diem'. 'gpt-5-mini' correctly merged the lines but had minor text errors. No monetary amounts. Selected by visual override.
